OAPPDesc: Holonic Standard Operating Procedures. Transforms static SOPs into living, executable, auditable, AI-native procedures stored as holons on the OASIS COSMIC hierarchy. Supports multi-step workflows with decision branching, Avatar sign-offs, AI (BRAID) guidance, deviation detection, and STARNET publishing. Every run produces an immutable proof holon. Integrates with CRM, ticketing, calendar, messaging, and document-signing systems via webhooks.
Author: OASIS_ADMIN

Zomes.Name: SOPZome
Zomes.Description: Procedure definitions and version history. The SOPHolon is the master record; SOPVersionHolon captures immutable snapshots on every approved change.

Holons.Name: SOPHolon
Holons.Description: Master definition of a Standard Operating Procedure. Referenced by all run, step, audit, and analytics holons via SOPId FK.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier — consistent across all storage providers.

Fields.Name: ParentHolonId
Fields.Description: COSMIC parent — typically the OAPPHolon for this organisation's SOP planet.

Fields.Name: Name
Fields.Description: Human-readable SOP title, e.g. 'Enterprise Customer Onboarding v3'.

Fields.Name: Description
Fields.Description: Detailed description of the SOP's purpose and scope.

Fields.Name: Version
Fields.Description: Semantic version string, e.g. '3.0.0'. Incremented on approved changes.

Fields.Name: Status
Fields.Description: Current lifecycle state of the SOP.

Fields.Name: OwnerAvatarId
Fields.Description: Avatar who owns and is accountable for this SOP.

Fields.Name: RequiredRoles
Fields.Description: List of role names required to execute this SOP, e.g. ['CustomerSuccessManager', 'SolutionsEngineer'].

Fields.Name: EstimatedDurationMinutes
Fields.Description: Expected wall-clock time to complete one full run.

Fields.Name: Category
Fields.Description: Primary domain this SOP belongs to.

Fields.Name: Tags
Fields.Description: Searchable tags for STARNET discovery.

Fields.Name: ParentSOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPHolon this was forked from on STARNET, if applicable.

Fields.Name: WorkflowHolonId
Fields.Description: FK to the persisted WorkflowDefinition holon in the CRE workflow engine (api/workflow/save).

Fields.Name: SourcePublicOnSTARNET
Fields.Description: Whether this SOP template is publicly discoverable on STARNET.

Fields.Name: LicenceType
Fields.Description: How other organisations can use this SOP template.

Fields.Name: CreatedByAvatarId
Fields.Description: Avatar who authored this SOP.

Fields.Name: CreatedOn
Fields.Description: Timestamp of first creation.

Fields.Name: LastModifiedOn
Fields.Description: Timestamp of most recent approved change.

Holons.Name: SOPVersionHolon
Holons.Description: Immutable snapshot of a SOPHolon at a specific version. Created automatically when a SOPHolon is approved for increment. Enables full change history and rollback.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the parent SOPHolon.

Fields.Name: Version
Fields.Description: The version captured in this snapshot.

Fields.Name: SnapshotJson
Fields.Description: Full JSON snapshot of the SOPHolon and its steps at this version.

Fields.Name: ChangeNote
Fields.Description: Human-readable description of what changed in this version.

Fields.Name: ChangedByAvatarId
Fields.Description: Avatar who approved this version increment.

Fields.Name: Status
Fields.Description: AIProposed = generated by BRAID improvement loop, awaiting human review.

Fields.Name: SnapshotOn
Fields.Description: When this version snapshot was created.

Zomes.Name: StepZome
Zomes.Description: Step and branching logic definitions. SOPStepHolon is the core instruction unit; SOPDecisionPointHolon and SOPConditionBranchHolon together model if/else branching.

Holons.Name: SOPStepHolon
Holons.Description: A single instruction within an SOP. Defines role, inputs/outputs, AI prompt, connector type (webhook, avatar, holon, braid, etc.), and failure handling.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the parent SOPHolon.

Fields.Name: StepNumber
Fields.Description: Ordinal position within the SOP (1-indexed). Steps with equal numbers run in parallel.

Fields.Name: Name
Fields.Description: Short step title, e.g. 'Send welcome email'.

Fields.Name: Description
Fields.Description: Full instruction text shown to the executor.

Fields.Name: AssignedRole
Fields.Description: Role name responsible for completing this step.

Fields.Name: ConnectorType
Fields.Description: CRE connector type that executes this step.

Fields.Name: ConnectorAction
Fields.Description: Specific action on the connector, e.g. 'create', 'update', 'sign', 'notify'.

Fields.Name: ConnectorConfig
Fields.Description: JSON string of connector-specific configuration (webhook URL, holon type, etc.).

Fields.Name: InputSchema
Fields.Description: JSON schema of required inputs for this step.

Fields.Name: OutputSchema
Fields.Description: JSON schema of outputs produced by this step.

Fields.Name: AIPrompt
Fields.Description: BRAID prompt sent to the AI model when executing this step. May reference {input.*} variables.

Fields.Name: RequiresAvatarSignOff
Fields.Description: If true, step cannot be completed without an Avatar wallet signature.

Fields.Name: RequiresEvidenceUpload
Fields.Description: If true, executor must upload at least one evidence file before completing.

Fields.Name: OnFailure
Fields.Description: What the runtime does if this step fails.

Fields.Name: MaxRetries
Fields.Description: Number of automatic retries before escalating.

Fields.Name: TimeoutMinutes
Fields.Description: Maximum time allowed for this step before a deviation is flagged.

Fields.Name: IsOptional
Fields.Description: Optional steps are skipped without creating a deviation if conditions are not met.

Fields.Name: DecisionPointId
Fields.Description: FK to SOPDecisionPointHolon if this step is the entry point of a branch.

Holons.Name: SOPDecisionPointHolon
Holons.Description: A branching node in the SOP graph. Evaluates a condition and routes execution to one of several SOPConditionBranchHolon paths.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the parent SOPHolon.

Fields.Name: StepNumber
Fields.Description: Position in the SOP step sequence.

Fields.Name: Name
Fields.Description: Decision label, e.g. 'Complexity Score Branch'.

Fields.Name: ConditionField
Fields.Description: The output field from the preceding step that is evaluated, e.g. 'IntegrationComplexityScore'.

Fields.Name: ConditionType
Fields.Description: How the condition is evaluated. ai_evaluated sends to BRAID for interpretation.

Fields.Name: DefaultBranchId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPConditionBranchHolon used if no other branch matches.

Holons.Name: SOPConditionBranchHolon
Holons.Description: A named branch from a decision point. Defines the condition value that triggers this branch and the first SOPStepHolon in the branch.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: DecisionPointId
Fields.Description: FK to the parent SOPDecisionPointHolon.

Fields.Name: SOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the parent SOPHolon.

Fields.Name: BranchName
Fields.Description: Human label for this branch, e.g. 'ENTERPRISE PATH'.

Fields.Name: ConditionValue
Fields.Description: The value that triggers this branch, e.g. '>=3' or 'RED' or 'true'.

Fields.Name: FirstStepId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPStepHolon where this branch begins.

Zomes.Name: RunZome
Zomes.Description: Execution instances and evidence. Every time an SOP is run, a SOPRunHolon is created. Every step completion creates a StepCompletionHolon. Deviations detected by AI or timeout create SOPDeviationHolon.

Holons.Name: SOPRunHolon
Holons.Description: A single execution instance of an SOP. Tracks all participants, current step, inputs, outputs, status, and links to the proof holon on completion.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPHolon being executed.

Fields.Name: WorkflowExecutionId
Fields.Description: The executionId returned by POST /api/workflow/execute.

Fields.Name: Status
Fields.Description: Current run state.

Fields.Name: InitiatedByAvatarId
Fields.Description: Avatar who started this run (or the system trigger if automated).

Fields.Name: AssignedAvatarIds
Fields.Description: All Avatar IDs participating in this run across all roles.

Fields.Name: CurrentStepId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPStepHolon currently active.

Fields.Name: ActiveBranchId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPConditionBranchHolon currently being followed, if branched.

Fields.Name: RunInputs
Fields.Description: JSON string of the trigger inputs that started this run.

Fields.Name: RunOutputs
Fields.Description: JSON string of accumulated outputs as steps complete.

Fields.Name: StartedAt
Fields.Description: Run start timestamp.

Fields.Name: EndedAt
Fields.Description: Run end timestamp — null if still running.

Fields.Name: ProofHolonId
Fields.Description: FK to the tamper-proof audit holon created on successful completion (via /api/workflow/verify).

Fields.Name: ExternalContextId
Fields.Description: ID from an external system that triggered this run, e.g. Salesforce OpportunityId, Zendesk TicketId.

Holons.Name: StepCompletionHolon
Holons.Description: Evidence record for a single completed step in a run. Stores the completing Avatar, evidence hash, duration, AI output, and signature.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPRunId
Fields.Description: FK to the parent SOPRunHolon.

Fields.Name: SOPStepId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPStepHolon that was completed.

Fields.Name: CompletedByAvatarId
Fields.Description: Avatar who completed this step.

Fields.Name: Status
Fields.Description: Outcome of this step in this run.

Fields.Name: StepInputs
Fields.Description: JSON of actual input values used.

Fields.Name: StepOutputs
Fields.Description: JSON of actual output values produced.

Fields.Name: AIGuidanceUsed
Fields.Description: Whether the executor consulted AI guidance for this step.

Fields.Name: AIOutputSummary
Fields.Description: Summary of what BRAID returned for this step, if used.

Fields.Name: EvidenceFileIds
Fields.Description: IDs of files uploaded as evidence (stored via FilesController).

Fields.Name: EvidenceHash
Fields.Description: SHA-256 of all evidence files concatenated — tamper detection.

Fields.Name: AvatarSignature
Fields.Description: Wallet signature of the completing Avatar, if RequiresAvatarSignOff = true.

Fields.Name: DurationSeconds
Fields.Description: Wall-clock seconds from step start to completion.

Fields.Name: CompletedAt
Fields.Description: Timestamp of completion.

Fields.Name: Notes
Fields.Description: Free-text notes added by the executor.

Holons.Name: SOPDeviationHolon
Holons.Description: An anomaly detected during a run — by AI, by timeout, or by a human flag. Drives the SOPIntel deviation heatmap and AI improvement suggestions.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPRunId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPRunHolon where this deviation occurred.

Fields.Name: SOPStepId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPStepHolon where the deviation was detected.

Fields.Name: SOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPHolon — used for aggregate analytics across runs.

Fields.Name: DeviationType
Fields.Description: Category of deviation.

Fields.Name: Severity
Fields.Description: Impact level — Critical deviations can trigger an escalation SOP.

Fields.Name: Description
Fields.Description: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.

Fields.Name: AIAnalysis
Fields.Description: BRAID's interpretation of why the deviation occurred.

Fields.Name: DetectedByAvatarId
Fields.Description: Avatar who flagged this deviation, if manually detected. Null if AI or system detected.

Fields.Name: ResolvedByAvatarId
Fields.Description: Avatar who resolved this deviation.

Fields.Name: ResolutionNote
Fields.Description: How the deviation was resolved.

Fields.Name: Status
Fields.Description: Current deviation state.

Fields.Name: DetectedAt
Fields.Description: When the deviation was first recorded.

Fields.Name: ResolvedAt
Fields.Description: When the deviation was resolved.

Zomes.Name: AuditZome
Zomes.Description: Immutable audit logs and aggregated analytics. SOPAuditHolon is the tamper-proof record of a completed run. SOPAnalyticsHolon accumulates metrics across all runs for SOPIntel.

Holons.Name: SOPAuditHolon
Holons.Description: Immutable audit certificate for a completed SOPRunHolon. Created automatically by the workflow engine on run completion and verified via /api/workflow/verify. Suitable for regulatory compliance, LP reporting, and contractual SLA evidence.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPRunId
Fields.Description: FK to the audited SOPRunHolon.

Fields.Name: SOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPHolon that was executed.

Fields.Name: SOPVersion
Fields.Description: The exact SOP version that was executed in this run.

Fields.Name: StartedAt
Fields.Description: Run start timestamp.

Fields.Name: CompletedAt
Fields.Description: Run completion timestamp.

Fields.Name: DurationSeconds
Fields.Description: Total wall-clock duration.

Fields.Name: Outcome
Fields.Description: Final run outcome.

Fields.Name: StepsCompleted
Fields.Description: Number of steps successfully completed.

Fields.Name: StepsSkipped
Fields.Description: Number of optional steps skipped.

Fields.Name: DeviationCount
Fields.Description: Total deviations detected during this run.

Fields.Name: CriticalDeviationCount
Fields.Description: Deviations with severity Critical.

Fields.Name: AvatarSignatures
Fields.Description: All Avatar wallet signatures collected during this run.

Fields.Name: EvidenceHashes
Fields.Description: All evidence SHA-256 hashes from all StepCompletionHolons in this run.

Fields.Name: ProofHolonId
Fields.Description: The tamper-proof holon ID returned by the workflow engine — verifiable on-chain.

Fields.Name: ExternalContextId
Fields.Description: External system reference, e.g. Salesforce OpportunityId.

Holons.Name: SOPAnalyticsHolon
Holons.Description: Aggregated performance metrics across all runs of a SOPHolon. Updated after every completed run. Powers the SOPIntel dashboard. One record per SOP.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPHolon being measured.

Fields.Name: TotalRuns
Fields.Description: All-time run count.

Fields.Name: CompletedRuns
Fields.Description: Runs that reached Completed status.

Fields.Name: FailedRuns
Fields.Description: Runs that reached Failed status.

Fields.Name: AbandonedRuns
Fields.Description: Runs that were abandoned mid-way.

Fields.Name: CompletionRate
Fields.Description: CompletedRuns / TotalRuns as a percentage.

Fields.Name: AvgDurationSeconds
Fields.Description: Mean wall-clock duration across completed runs.

Fields.Name: P95DurationSeconds
Fields.Description: 95th percentile duration — used for SLA monitoring.

Fields.Name: TotalDeviations
Fields.Description: All-time deviation count.

Fields.Name: DeviationsPerRun
Fields.Description: Mean deviations per run.

Fields.Name: MostDeviatedStepId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPStepHolon with the highest deviation count.

Fields.Name: AIImprovementsPending
Fields.Description: Number of AI-proposed SOPVersionHolons awaiting human review.

Fields.Name: LastRunAt
Fields.Description: Timestamp of the most recent run.

Fields.Name: LastUpdatedAt
Fields.Description: When this analytics record was last recalculated.

Zomes.Name: IntegrationZome
Zomes.Description: External system connections. IntegrationTriggerHolon defines what fires an SOP. WebhookConfigHolon defines outbound connections. ExternalSystemLinkHolon binds a run to a specific external record.

Holons.Name: IntegrationTriggerHolon
Holons.Description: Defines what event fires a new SOPRunHolon. Supports webhooks (inbound from external systems), schedules (cron), manual starts, and holon events (another holon changing state).

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPHolon this trigger fires.

Fields.Name: TriggerType
Fields.Description: What activates this trigger.

Fields.Name: WebhookUrl
Fields.Description: The ONODE endpoint that receives the inbound trigger event (if TriggerType = Webhook).

Fields.Name: WebhookSecret
Fields.Description: HMAC secret for verifying inbound webhook authenticity.

Fields.Name: CronExpression
Fields.Description: Cron schedule string (if TriggerType = Schedule), e.g. '0 9 1 * *' for 1st of month 9am.

Fields.Name: SourceSOPRunId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPRunHolon whose completion fires this trigger (if TriggerType = SOPRunComplete).

Fields.Name: InputMapping
Fields.Description: JSON mapping of trigger payload fields to SOPRunHolon.RunInputs fields.

Fields.Name: IsActive
Fields.Description: Whether this trigger is currently active.

Holons.Name: WebhookConfigHolon
Holons.Description: An outbound webhook connection from a step to an external system. One WebhookConfigHolon per step-system connection.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPStepId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPStepHolon that sends this webhook.

Fields.Name: SOPId
Fields.Description: FK to the parent SOPHolon.

Fields.Name: SystemName
Fields.Description: The external system being called.

Fields.Name: EventType
Fields.Description: The action being performed in the external system, e.g. 'create_ticket', 'update_opportunity_stage', 'send_message'.

Fields.Name: EndpointUrl
Fields.Description: Full URL of the external system API endpoint.

Fields.Name: AuthType
Fields.Description: Authentication method.

Fields.Name: AuthSecretRef
Fields.Description: Reference to the vault secret holding the auth credential (never stored in plain text).

Fields.Name: PayloadTemplate
Fields.Description: JSON template for the outbound payload. Supports {input.*} and {output.*} variable interpolation.

Fields.Name: OnSuccess
Fields.Description: What to do with the external system's response.

Fields.Name: ResponseMapping
Fields.Description: JSON mapping of external response fields to SOPStepHolon outputs.

Holons.Name: ExternalSystemLinkHolon
Holons.Description: Binds a specific SOPRunHolon to records in external systems. Enables bi-directional lookup: from OASIS find the CRM record, from the CRM find the SOP run.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: SOPRunId
Fields.Description: FK to the SOPRunHolon.

Fields.Name: SystemName
Fields.Description: Name of the external system.

Fields.Name: RecordType
Fields.Description: Type of record in the external system, e.g. 'Opportunity', 'Ticket', 'Deal'.

Fields.Name: ExternalId
Fields.Description: The ID of the record in the external system.

Fields.Name: ExternalUrl
Fields.Description: Direct URL to the record in the external system.

Fields.Name: LinkedAt
Fields.Description: When this link was established.
